title: Manage Duplicates - Add Ability to Export
excerpt: It would be very helpful to be able to export to Excel the list created with the Manage Duplicates feature.  We often need to review amongst several people, so while sometime it would be desirable to use this feature to …

posts.author: hbristol (Heather Bristol)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be very helpful to be able to export to Excel the list created with the Manage Duplicates feature. We often need to review amongst several people, so while sometime it would be desirable to use this feature to eliminate duplicates directly, often just producing and exporting the list would be extremely helpful.

Of course, alternatively, that need would be reduced if they could be flagged directly in the boards.

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @hbristol ,
If you’re open to apps, I can suggest Smart Spreadsheet for monday. You can make use of condittional formatting feature to find duplicates on board data (that are you can auto import to a spreadsheet) or apply Countif formula to board data in excel.
